en.gate.continueDetail: Continue gate: inspect dirty projects and confirm the current work scope before moving on.
en.gate.publishDetail: Publish gate: publish stays copy-only until dirty paths, staged scope, guard and dry-run evidence are checked.
en.gate.cleanupDetail: Cleanup gate: cleanup requires clean worktrees and reachability or explicit semantic supersession evidence.
en.overview.title: Workspace overview
en.overview.nextReviewDirty: Review {count} dirty project(s) before publish or cleanup.
en.overview.nextReviewSignals: Review warning/codex signals before publish: warnings {warnings}, task branches {codex}.
en.overview.nextReady: Workspace snapshot is clean enough for guarded publish dry-run.
en.overview.noBlockers: No blockers in the current snapshot.
en.overview.worktreeReviewBody: {count} workspace signal(s) need review before cleanup.
en.projects.title: Projects
en.memory.title: Memory
en.memory.note: Read-only memory status from the dashboard snapshot. The board does not run lookup, golden, rebuild or hooks.
en.memory.reefikiRole: Durable markdown knowledge, decisions and procedures.
en.memory.memoirMeta: runtime status is available through memory status, not this dashboard snapshot
en.memory.graphifyMeta: graph traversal data is not part of ops-dashboard.v2 snapshot
en.memory.noRuntimeCalls: no memory golden, rebuild, hook or package script is run from the board
en.memory.snapshotMissingReason: The dashboard backend did not return the memory payload. This usually means an older server process is still open or the API returned a partial snapshot.
en.memory.snapshotMissingNext: Restart or refresh the dashboard from the current branch, then reload /api/snapshot.
en.memory.statusFromSnapshotDetail: Provider state is read from the current dashboard snapshot.
en.memory.topologyNote: Capture, durable wiki and structural graph stay separate; the board only shows read-only signals.
en.memory.flowCaptureDetail: incoming facts, notes and project signals
en.memory.flowQueryDetail: agents select a compact candidate context before answering
en.memory.copyOnlyBoundary: The board only copies commands and never runs memory lookups or rebuilds.
en.worktrees.title: Worktrees
en.worktrees.note: Read-only branch/worktree signals derived from project git status.
en.publish.title: Publish
en.publish.note: This board never publishes. It only shows copy-only guarded next actions.
en.publish.continueBody: Continue work is safe only when the current scope is explicit.
en.publish.publishBody: Publish requires staged scope, guard, dry-run and explicit operator action outside the board.
en.publish.cleanupBody: Cleanup requires clean status and reachability or semantic supersession evidence.
en.publish.commandBody: Copy this command to the terminal when the scope is approved.
en.publish.signalDirtyBody: Current snapshot has dirty projects: {dirty}; warnings: {warnings}.
en.publish.signalCleanBody: No dirty or warning signal in the current snapshot.
en.publish.signalScopeBody: Staged files are not available in the dashboard snapshot; verify in terminal.
en.publish.signalSecretScanBody: Secret scan result is not part of this snapshot; run a changed-path scan before publish.
en.publish.signalPublicSnapshotBody: Public/private diff class is decided by publish-task dry-run, not by the board.
en.publish.matrixDryRunBody: Dry-run result is not part of the current snapshot; copy the guarded command when publish scope is approved.
en.publish.matrixDualRemoteBody: Origin/public remote readiness is verified by publish-task dry-run, not by the dashboard.
en.publish.matrixPublicPrivateBody: Public/private/unclassified file counts are unavailable until publish-task dry-run runs outside the board.
en.review.title: Review
en.review.note: Bounded review queue surface, not a broad graph query.
en.review.missingBacklinksBody: Durable wiki pages that need bounded backlink review.
en.review.conflictsBody: Conflicting claims or decisions that need manual resolution.
en.review.orphansBody: Pages that are weakly connected to the durable wiki graph.
en.review.placeholdersBody: Links or references that still need concrete durable targets.
en.review.promotionDraftsBody: Memoir-to-REEFIKI durable draft items waiting for review.
en.review.noisyPagesUnavailable: No churn/noisy-page metric is available in the current snapshot.
en.sprint.title: Sprint
en.sprint.taskNoDetail: no task detail in current snapshot
en.sprint.noEvidence: No durable log evidence in the current snapshot.
en.logs.title: Logs
en.logs.note: Allowlisted log tail only; secret-like values are redacted by the API.
en.table.name: Name
en.verdict.clean: No dirty or warning projects in the current snapshot.
en.rail.title: Selected item
en.rail.empty: Choose a row or card to inspect.
en.rail.copyOnly: All actions are copy-only. The dashboard never writes, publishes, pulls, fetches or cleans up.
en.field.head: Head
en.commandHelp.connect: Copies a REEFIKI connect handoff for this project. It does not connect anything by itself.
en.commandHelp.status: Copies a git status command so you can inspect the branch and dirty paths in a terminal.
en.commandHelp.publishDryRun: Copies the guarded publish dry-run command. Run it only after the current scope is approved.
en.commandHelp.guardStaged: Copies the staged-scope guard. It checks that only approved paths are staged.
en.commandHelp.secretScan: Copies a changed-path secret scan command for pre-publish safety.
en.commandHelp.memoryStatus: Copies a memory status command. The dashboard itself does not call memory providers.
en.commandHelp.reviewQueues: Copies a bounded review queue summary command for the REEFIKI project.
en.commandHelp.searchTask: Copies a repo search command for the selected task or note.
en.commandHelp.snapshot: Copies a read-only dashboard snapshot command.
en.commandHelp.worktreeList: Copies git worktree list so cleanup candidates can be inspected manually.
en.commandHelp.generic: Copies this command to the clipboard. The dashboard never executes commands.
en.warning.dirty.title: Dirty worktree
en.warning.dirty.what: {count} changed path(s) are present in this project.
en.warning.dirty.why: Publish and cleanup are risky while local changes are unreviewed.
en.warning.dirty.next: Inspect exact paths, decide ownership, then commit, move or explicitly exclude them.
en.warning.agents.title: Missing AGENTS.md
en.warning.agents.what: No project-local agent contract was detected.
en.warning.agents.why: Agents may miss local rules, safety boundaries and expected checks.
en.warning.agents.next: Add or connect an AGENTS.md when this project should be agent-managed.
en.warning.ci.title: Missing CI
en.warning.ci.what: No GitHub workflow or CI marker was detected.
en.warning.ci.why: There is no obvious automated verification surface for this project.
en.warning.ci.next: Treat dashboard visibility as advisory and verify manually or add CI later.
en.warning.tests.title: Tests not detected
en.warning.tests.what: No common test marker was detected in the current snapshot.
en.warning.tests.why: Automated regression confidence may be weak for this project.
en.warning.tests.next: Run the project-specific check manually or add a detectable test marker later.
en.warning.mappingMissing.title: REEFIKI mapping missing
en.warning.mappingMissing.what: The workspace folder is not connected to a REEFIKI project in this snapshot.
en.warning.mappingMissing.why: Dashboard cannot link this repo to durable wiki context and project rules.
en.warning.mappingMissing.next: Use the connect handoff only if this repo should become a REEFIKI project.
en.warning.mappingAmbiguous.title: REEFIKI mapping ambiguous
en.warning.mappingAmbiguous.what: The folder and marker point to conflicting or duplicate REEFIKI projects.
en.warning.mappingAmbiguous.why: Automated handoff may target the wrong durable wiki project.
en.warning.mappingAmbiguous.next: Resolve the marker/project name before publish or cleanup.
en.warning.taskBranch.title: Task branch
en.warning.taskBranch.what: This project is on a codex/* branch.
en.warning.taskBranch.why: Task branches need review, publish/merge decision and cleanup evidence.
en.warning.taskBranch.next: Check whether the task is active, published, superseded or safe to clean.
en.warning.upstream.title: No upstream branch
en.warning.upstream.why: Ahead/behind state cannot be trusted without an upstream.
en.warning.upstream.next: Inspect remotes before deciding publish or cleanup.
en.warning.gitStatus.title: Git status failed
en.warning.gitStatus.why: Dashboard could not read reliable git status for this project.
en.warning.gitStatus.next: Run the inspect status command manually and treat the snapshot as incomplete.
en.warning.gitRoot.title: Git root lookup failed
en.warning.gitRoot.why: Dashboard could not confirm the repository root.
en.warning.gitRoot.next: Verify the path manually before acting on this project.
en.warning.secretSkipped.title: Secret-like paths skipped
en.warning.secretSkipped.why: Dashboard intentionally avoids reading secret-like files.
en.warning.secretSkipped.next: Do not expose those paths in chat; run scoped secret checks if publishing.
en.warning.forbiddenSkipped.title: Ignored directories skipped
en.warning.forbiddenSkipped.why: Generated or vendor directories are ignored to keep the snapshot safe and fast.
en.warning.forbiddenSkipped.next: No action is usually needed unless important source files live there.
en.warning.unknown.title: Snapshot warning: {code}
en.warning.unknown.what: Dashboard received a warning without a known explanation.
en.warning.unknown.why: The snapshot has more detail than the current UI explanation catalog.
en.warning.unknown.next: Inspect the source command output before taking publish or cleanup action.
en.empty.currentWork: No current work in this snapshot.
en.empty.attention: No attention items in this snapshot.
en.empty.projects: No git projects discovered under the workspace root.
en.empty.projectsFiltered: No projects match the current search or filter.
en.empty.worktrees: No worktree signals in this snapshot.
en.empty.worktreesFiltered: No worktrees match the current search or filter.
en.empty.review: No review queue items in current snapshot.
en.empty.activeTasks: No active task in current snapshot.
en.empty.nextTasks: No next task in current snapshot.
en.empty.logsFiltered: No log lines match the current search or filter.

ru.gate.continueDetail: Continue gate: сначала проверь dirty-проекты и подтверди текущий scope работы.
ru.gate.publishDetail: Publish gate: publish остаётся copy-only, пока не проверены dirty paths, staged scope, guard и dry-run.
ru.gate.cleanupDetail: Cleanup gate: cleanup требует clean worktrees и reachability либо явный semantic supersession evidence.
ru.overview.title: Обзор workspace
ru.overview.nextReviewSignals: Проверь предупреждения и task-ветки: warnings {warnings}, task branches {codex}.
ru.overview.nextReady: Snapshot достаточно чистый для guarded publish dry-run.
ru.projects.title: Проекты
ru.memory.title: Память
ru.memory.note: Read-only memory status из dashboard snapshot. Board не запускает lookup, golden, rebuild или hooks.
ru.memory.reefikiRole: Durable markdown knowledge, decisions и procedures.
ru.memory.graphifyRole: Структурный code/document graph как candidate layer.
ru.memory.memoirMeta: runtime status доступен через memory status, но не в этом dashboard snapshot
ru.memory.graphifyMeta: graph traversal data не входит в ops-dashboard.v2 snapshot
ru.memory.noRuntimeCalls: board не запускает memory golden, rebuild, hooks или package scripts
ru.memory.snapshotMissingReason: Dashboard backend не вернул memory payload. Обычно это старый открытый server process или частичный API snapshot.
ru.memory.snapshotMissingNext: Перезапусти или обнови dashboard из текущей ветки, затем перезагрузи /api/snapshot.
ru.memory.statusFromSnapshotDetail: Provider state читается из текущего dashboard snapshot.
ru.memory.topologyNote: Capture, durable wiki и structural graph остаются разными слоями; board показывает только read-only сигналы.
ru.memory.flowCaptureDetail: входящие факты, заметки и project signals
ru.memory.flowQueryDetail: агенты выбирают компактный context перед ответом
ru.memory.copyOnlyBoundary: Board только копирует команды и не запускает memory lookup или rebuild.
ru.worktrees.title: Worktrees
ru.worktrees.note: Read-only branch/worktree signals из git status проектов.
ru.publish.title: Publish
ru.publish.note: Board не публикует. Он показывает только copy-only guarded next actions.
ru.publish.continueBody: Продолжать можно только при явном текущем scope.
ru.publish.publishBody: Publish требует staged scope, guard, dry-run и явное действие оператора вне board.
ru.publish.cleanupBody: Cleanup требует clean status и reachability или semantic supersession evidence.
ru.publish.commandBody: Скопируй команду в терминал только когда scope подтверждён.
ru.publish.signalCleanBody: В snapshot нет dirty или warning сигналов.
ru.publish.signalScopeBody: Staged files не входят в dashboard snapshot; проверяй в терминале.
ru.publish.signalSecretScanBody: Secret scan не входит в этот snapshot; перед publish нужен changed-path scan.
ru.publish.signalPublicSnapshotBody: Public/private diff class решает publish-task dry-run, не board.
ru.publish.matrixDryRunBody: Dry-run result не входит в текущий snapshot; копируй guarded command только когда publish scope подтверждён.
ru.publish.matrixDualRemoteBody: Готовность origin/public remote проверяет publish-task dry-run, не dashboard.
ru.publish.matrixPublicPrivateBody: Public/private/unclassified counts недоступны до запуска publish-task dry-run вне board.
ru.review.title: Review
ru.review.note: Ограниченная review queue, не широкий graph query.
ru.review.missingBacklinksBody: Durable wiki pages, которым нужен bounded backlink review.
ru.review.conflictsBody: Конфликтующие claims или решения, требующие ручного resolve.
ru.review.orphansBody: Страницы со слабой связностью в durable wiki graph.
ru.review.placeholdersBody: Links или references, которым ещё нужен конкретный durable target.
ru.review.noisyPagesUnavailable: Churn/noisy-page metric отсутствует в текущем snapshot.
ru.sprint.title: Sprint
ru.sprint.noEvidence: В текущем snapshot нет durable log evidence.
ru.logs.title: Logs
ru.logs.note: Только allowlisted log tail; секретоподобные значения редактируются API.
ru.table.name: Имя
ru.verdict.clean: В snapshot нет dirty или warning проектов.
ru.rail.title: Выбранный элемент
ru.rail.empty: Выбери строку или карточку для деталей.
ru.rail.copyOnly: Все действия copy-only. Dashboard не пишет, не публикует, не делает pull/fetch и не чистит worktrees.
ru.field.head: Head
ru.commandHelp.connect: Копирует handoff для подключения проекта к REEFIKI. Сам dashboard ничего не подключает.
ru.commandHelp.status: Копирует git status команду, чтобы вручную увидеть ветку и dirty paths в терминале.
ru.commandHelp.publishDryRun: Копирует guarded publish dry-run. Запускай только после подтверждения текущего scope.
ru.commandHelp.guardStaged: Копирует staged-scope guard. Он проверяет, что staged только разрешённые пути.
ru.commandHelp.secretScan: Копирует changed-path secret scan для проверки перед publish.
ru.commandHelp.memoryStatus: Копирует memory status команду. Сам dashboard memory providers не вызывает.
ru.commandHelp.reviewQueues: Копирует bounded review queue summary команду для проекта REEFIKI.
ru.commandHelp.searchTask: Копирует поиск по repo для выбранной задачи или заметки.
ru.commandHelp.worktreeList: Копирует git worktree list, чтобы вручную проверить cleanup-кандидатов.
ru.commandHelp.generic: Копирует команду в буфер. Dashboard никогда не исполняет команды.
ru.warning.dirty.title: Dirty worktree
ru.warning.dirty.why: Publish и cleanup рискованны, пока локальные изменения не разобраны.
ru.warning.dirty.next: Проверь точные пути, реши ownership, затем закоммить, перенеси или явно исключи их.
ru.warning.agents.title: Нет AGENTS.md
ru.warning.agents.what: Локальный контракт для агентов не найден.
ru.warning.agents.why: Агент может не увидеть правила проекта, границы безопасности и ожидаемые проверки.
ru.warning.agents.next: Добавь или подключи AGENTS.md, если проект должен управляться агентами.
ru.warning.ci.title: Нет CI
ru.warning.ci.what: GitHub workflow или другой CI-маркер не найден.
ru.warning.ci.why: Не видно автоматической поверхности проверки для этого проекта.
ru.warning.ci.next: Считай сигнал advisory: проверь вручную или добавь CI позже.
ru.warning.tests.title: Tests не найдены
ru.warning.tests.what: В snapshot не найден типовой маркер тестов.
ru.warning.tests.why: Автоматическая уверенность в regression может быть слабой.
ru.warning.tests.next: Запусти project-specific check вручную или позже добавь распознаваемый test marker.
ru.warning.mappingMissing.title: Нет REEFIKI mapping
ru.warning.mappingMissing.what: Workspace folder не подключён к REEFIKI project в текущем snapshot.
ru.warning.mappingMissing.why: Dashboard не может связать repo с durable wiki context и правилами проекта.
ru.warning.mappingMissing.next: Используй connect handoff только если этот repo должен стать REEFIKI project.
ru.warning.mappingAmbiguous.title: Неоднозначный REEFIKI mapping
ru.warning.mappingAmbiguous.what: Папка и marker указывают на конфликтующие или повторяющиеся REEFIKI projects.
ru.warning.mappingAmbiguous.why: Автоматический handoff может попасть не в тот durable wiki project.
ru.warning.mappingAmbiguous.next: Разрули marker/project name до publish или cleanup.
ru.warning.taskBranch.title: Task branch
ru.warning.taskBranch.why: Task branch требует review, решения publish/merge и cleanup evidence.
ru.warning.taskBranch.next: Проверь, задача активна, опубликована, заменена или безопасна для cleanup.
ru.warning.upstream.title: Нет upstream branch
ru.warning.upstream.why: Ahead/behind нельзя считать надёжным без upstream.
ru.warning.upstream.next: Проверь remotes перед publish или cleanup решением.
ru.warning.gitStatus.title: Git status не прочитан
ru.warning.gitStatus.why: Dashboard не получил надёжный git status для проекта.
ru.warning.gitStatus.next: Запусти inspect status вручную и считай snapshot неполным.
ru.warning.gitRoot.title: Git root не найден
ru.warning.gitRoot.why: Dashboard не смог подтвердить root репозитория.
ru.warning.gitRoot.next: Проверь путь вручную перед любым действием.
ru.warning.secretSkipped.title: Secret-like paths пропущены
ru.warning.secretSkipped.why: Dashboard намеренно не читает файлы, похожие на секреты.
ru.warning.secretSkipped.next: Не раскрывай эти пути в чате; перед publish запускай scoped secret checks.
ru.warning.forbiddenSkipped.title: Ignored dirs пропущены
ru.warning.forbiddenSkipped.why: Generated/vendor директории игнорируются, чтобы snapshot был безопасным и быстрым.
ru.warning.forbiddenSkipped.next: Обычно ничего делать не нужно, если важный source не лежит внутри.
ru.warning.unknown.title: Snapshot warning: {code}
ru.warning.unknown.what: Dashboard получил warning, для которого ещё нет описания.
ru.warning.unknown.why: Snapshot знает больше, чем текущий UI-каталог объяснений.
ru.warning.unknown.next: Проверь source command output перед publish или cleanup решением.
ru.empty.projects: Под workspace root не найдено git projects.
ru.empty.projectsFiltered: Нет проектов под текущий поиск или фильтр.
ru.empty.worktreesFiltered: Нет worktrees под текущий поиск или фильтр.
ru.empty.review: В текущем snapshot нет review queue items.
ru.empty.activeTasks: В текущем snapshot нет active task.
ru.empty.nextTasks: В текущем snapshot нет next task.
ru.empty.logsFiltered: Нет log lines под текущий поиск или фильтр.
